title: PwC India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: PwC India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!
